content.text:
We planned the full RBAC system based on PP Intelligence's Firebase pattern. Here's the build order:

1. `constants/roles.js` — module keys, default roles, permission helpers
2. `services/UserService.js` — CRUD + secondary Firebase app for user creation
3. `services/RoleService.js` — CRUD for editable roles
4. `contexts/AuthContext.jsx` — rewrite with role resolution
5. `components/admin/RoleGuard.jsx` — route protection
6. `components/admin/AdminLayout.jsx` — filter sidebar by permissions
7. `pages/admin/Settings.jsx` — Users + Roles + Profile tabs
8. `App.jsx` — wrap routes with RoleGuard
9. `firestore.rules` — server-side role enforcement

Let me start building. I'll do the foundational layers first in parallel.

input.subject: Create constants/roles.js — module keys, default roles, permission helpers
input.description: Define MODULES, ALL_MODULE_KEYS, OWNER_ROLE (hardcoded), DEFAULT_ROLES (manager, employee, viewer), buildRolesMap, getEffectivePermissions, canAccessModule, isOwner helpers. Based on PP Intelligence pattern.

content.content: Task #1 created successfully: Create constants/roles.js — module keys, default roles, permission helpers

task.subject: Create constants/roles.js — module keys, default roles, permission helpers

input.subject: Create services/UserService.js — CRUD + secondary Firebase app
input.description: fetchAllUsers, fetchUser, createUser (secondary Firebase app to avoid session hijack), updateUser, deactivateUser, activateUser, deleteUserProfile. Based on PP Intelligence UserService.

content.content: Task #2 created successfully: Create services/UserService.js — CRUD + secondary Firebase app

task.subject: Create services/UserService.js — CRUD + secondary Firebase app

input.subject: Create services/RoleService.js — CRUD for editable roles
input.description: fetchAllRoles, createRole, updateRole, deleteRole, seedDefaultRolesIfEmpty, countUsersForRole. Based on PP Intelligence RoleService.

content.content: Task #3 created successfully: Create services/RoleService.js — CRUD for editable roles

task.subject: Create services/RoleService.js — CRUD for editable roles

input.subject: Rewrite AuthContext.jsx with role resolution
input.description: Fetch admin_users/{uid} doc on login, subscribe to roles collection, expose: userProfile, roles, rolesMap, isOwner, canAccessModule, permissions, refreshUserProfile. Bootstrap first user as owner. Based on PP Intelligence AuthContext.

content.content: Task #4 created successfully: Rewrite AuthContext.jsx with role resolution

input.subject: Create components/admin/RoleGuard.jsx
input.description: Route guard component that checks canAccessModule(moduleKey). Shows access denied screen or redirects to first accessible page. Based on PP Intelligence RoleGuard.

content.content: Task #5 created successfully: Create components/admin/RoleGuard.jsx

input.subject: Update AdminLayout.jsx — filter sidebar by permissions, show role
input.description: Filter sidebarLinks based on canAccessModule. Show user's role label instead of hardcoded "Administrador". Add Settings link for owner only.

content.content: Task #6 created successfully: Update AdminLayout.jsx — filter sidebar by permissions, show role

task.subject: Update AdminLayout.jsx — filter sidebar by permissions, show role

input.subject: Create pages/admin/Settings.jsx — Users + Roles + Profile tabs
input.description: Full settings page with: Profile tab (all users edit name), Users tab (owner: create/edit/deactivate users), Roles tab (owner: create/edit/delete roles with permission toggles). Based on PP Intelligence Configuracion page, adapted to GG's navy/gold design.

content.content: Task #7 created successfully: Create pages/admin/Settings.jsx — Users + Roles + Profile tabs

task.subject: Create pages/admin/Settings.jsx — Users + Roles + Profile tabs

input.subject: Update App.jsx — wrap admin routes with RoleGuard
input.description: Add RoleGuard wrappers to each admin route with correct module keys. Add /admin/configuracion route for Settings page (owner-only via ownerOnly prop).

content.content: Task #8 created successfully: Update App.jsx — wrap admin routes with RoleGuard

task.subject: Update App.jsx — wrap admin routes with RoleGuard

input.subject: Rewrite firestore.rules with role-based enforcement
input.description: Add isSignedIn, isOwner, isAdminOrOwner helpers. Protect admin_users and roles collections. Bootstrap rule for first user. Tighten write rules on products, orders, etc.

lines: -import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect } from 'react'
+import React, { createContext, useContext, useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
+ * - currentUser: Firebase Auth user object (or null)
+ * - userProfile: Firestore admin_users doc with role/permissions (or null)
+ * - roles: array of role docs from Firestore
+ * - rolesMap: Map<key, roleDoc> including the hardcoded owner role
+ * - loading: true while auth + profile + roles are resolving
+ * - permissions: effective permission list for the current user
+ * Bootstrap: the FIRST user to log in is auto-promoted to owner if no
+ * admin_users doc exists for them yet.
+  // Subscribe to the user's Firestore profile doc
+      // No profile doc — bootstrap this user as owner
+        console.warn('Could not bootstrap user profile:', err.message)
+            // Seed default roles once we have a confirmed owner/admin profile
+          console.error('Error subscribing to user profile:', err)
+    [currentUser, userProfile, roles, rolesMap, loading, canAccessModule, refreshUserProfile]

lines: +    // ADMIN_USERS — profile docs with role + permissions
+      // Any signed-in user can read their own profile. Owner can read all.
+      // Bootstrap: first user creates their own doc as owner
+      // Owner can create any user doc (admin panel)
+      // Owner can update any user. Users can update their own fullName only.
+      // Only owner can delete user docs
+      // Any authenticated user can read roles (needed to resolve own permissions)
+      allow create, update, delete: if isOwner();
+    // PRODUCTS — public read, active admin write
-    // Orders — public create (customers place orders), authenticated read/update
+    // ORDERS — public create (customers), active admin manage
-      allow read, update, delete: if request.auth != null;
+      allow read, update, delete: if isActiveUser();
-    // Buy requests (sell offers from customers) — public create, authenticated manage
+    // BUY REQUESTS — public create, active admin manage
-      allow read, update, delete: if request.auth != null;
+      allow read, update, delete: if isActiveUser();
-    // Brokerage requests (import orders from customers) — public create, authenticated manage
+    // BROKERAGE REQUESTS — public create, active admin manage
-      allow read, update, delete: if request.auth != null;
+      allow read, update, delete: if isActiveUser();
-      allow read, write: if request.auth != null;
-    // Personal collection — public read for isPublic items, authenticated write
+    // PERSONAL COLLECTION — public read, active admin write
-      allow read, write: if request.auth != null;
-      allow read, write: if request.auth != null;
-      allow read, write: if request.auth != null;
